basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IISER Pune Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemistry or relevant areas
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Chemistry or relevant areas

salary_details.details: Rs. 58,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance Per Month

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Research Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IISER Pune Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate-I position at IISER Pune is scheduled for 22nd June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Research Associate-I position is a Ph.D. in Chemistry or relevant areas. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered based on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate-I position will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate-I position at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the IISER Pune office. The specific address is Pune, Maharashtra, 411008.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate-I position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job. The position of Research Associate-I is offered on a contractual basis.
